kestra.name: Kestra
kestra.note: Aggression. Run-fork: attack with her once -> Attacker; don't attack for two matches -> Withheld. Pick one, the other locks for the run. Effects stack; each node needs the one above it.

nodes.name: First blood
nodes.signal: attacked at least once
nodes.ability: +1 power

nodes.name: Press the attack
nodes.signal: attacked 3+ times in a match
nodes.ability: -1 cost

nodes.name: Never hesitate
nodes.signal: attacked every turn you were able
nodes.ability: gains haste

nodes.name: Thrives on pain
nodes.signal: took damage but survived the match
nodes.ability: +1/+1 while below half life

nodes.name: Last stand
nodes.signal: commander knocked out in a match
nodes.ability: +2 power / -1 toughness (trade-off)

nodes.name: The split
nodes.signal: knocked out three times across the run
nodes.ability: Kestra splits in two (lore transformation)

paths.name: The Withheld
paths.entry: Don't attack with her for two matches (earned)

nodes.name: Untouchable
nodes.signal: finished a match unwounded
nodes.ability: gains first strike, but +1 cost

nodes.name: Duelist's pride
nodes.signal: won a match unwounded
nodes.ability: enemies must block her if able (taunt)

nodes.name: Sulk
nodes.signal: benched a whole match (never in combat)
nodes.ability: next match she enters with a burst = turns she sat out

nodes.name: Vengeance
nodes.signal: benched two matches
nodes.ability: when she finally swings, unblockable that turn

wylda.name: Wylda
wylda.note: Patient grower. Wants you to LEAVE Light unspent ('for the trees') and survive damage without being knocked out. Offers creature discounts + scar-growth. Define her paths + nodes here.

paths.name: Natures Bounty
paths.entry: Leaving mana unspent, track the total amount of mana unspent between turns and this becomes a signal.

nodes.name: Creek of light
nodes.signal: Leave atleast 3 unspent mana in a signal match
nodes.ability: When Green is on the field creatures cost 1 less to summon

nodes.name: Stream of light
nodes.signal: Win a match without casting any spells
nodes.ability: At the end of your turn, you can spend 3 unspent mana to give every creature +1/+1 (can be activated multiple times

nodes.name: River of Light
nodes.signal: Win a match without spending any mana for 3 turns.
nodes.ability: Creatures you control gain "tap: gain one light"

nodes.name: Light Fall
nodes.signal: Generate 30 mana in one match using river of light
nodes.ability: Stream of light activated ability costs 1 mana

paths.name: Defender of the forest
paths.entry: Use cards to block, having them not die in the battle.

nodes.name: Canopy
nodes.signal: Use creatures to block and have none of die in a battle
nodes.ability: Creatures get +0/+1

nodes.name: Hard Bark
nodes.signal: Do not take damage from a creature in a match
nodes.ability:
Creatures can block one additional creature.
Canopy bonus increases to +0/+2

nodes.name: Branches
nodes.signal: Do not take damage from a creature in a match (again)
nodes.ability: When green is on the field, creatures gain reach

nodes.name: Song of the forest
nodes.signal: In a signal match block atleast 50 damage without losing a creature
nodes.ability: When Green is on the field, creatures you control can block more than 1 creature and gain death touch.

liora.name: Liora
liora.note: Foresight + control. TWO trees. THE PLANNER: spend Light perfectly (never strand Light you could have played) and win from hidden information / held 'plans' (e.g. removal kept in hand) -> spell-cost reductions, more spells per turn. THE GAMBLER: introduces coin-flip / dice randomness; beat the odds -> tilt luck in your favour (rerolls, choose the result). Many signals are secret.

paths.name: The Planner
paths.entry: Plan perfectly — spend all your Light every turn (never strand Light you could have played), and win from your hand.

nodes.name: Clockwork
nodes.signal: ended a match having spent all your Light every single turn
nodes.ability: spells cost 1 less Light

nodes.name: Efficiency
nodes.signal: cast 2+ spells in a single turn, in a match you won
nodes.ability: the first spell you cast each turn costs 1 less

nodes.name: Inevitability
nodes.signal: won a match having cast 3+ spells in one turn
nodes.ability: once per turn, your cheapest spell in hand costs 0

nodes.name: The held plan
nodes.signal: won a match while holding a creature-removal spell in hand the whole game (never cast it)
nodes.ability: you may hold one extra card past the hand limit, and you see the top card of your deck

paths.name: The Gambler
paths.entry: Court chance — be in it whenever a coin is flipped or a die rolled. (This path introduces flips/rolls to the game.)

nodes.name: Beginner's luck
nodes.signal: won a match in which a coin flip or die roll went your way
nodes.ability: once per match, flip a coin — heads, draw a card

nodes.name: Loaded dice
nodes.signal: won 3 flips or rolls in a single match
nodes.ability: once per match, reroll one flip or roll that went against you

nodes.name: House edge
nodes.signal: won a match without a single flip or roll going against you
nodes.ability: once per turn, choose which side your coin lands on

nodes.name: Fixed game
nodes.signal: beat 1-in-4 odds (or worse) and won that match
nodes.ability: the first unfavourable roll each turn is automatically rerolled in your favour

aurelle.name: Aurelle
aurelle.note: Stasis, protection, the old empire — and ORDER. INVERTED FORK (like Red): RIGHT OF RULE (spend your subjects' lives so no blow lands on you — aristocrat lifegain) vs THE MARTYR-KING (take the blows on your own life, spare your people — endure / lifegain). Pick one, lock the other. PLUS DECREES OF ORDER: spend Light to enact Laws of the realm you CHOOSE (at a cutscene), accumulating more over the run.

paths.name: Right of Rule
paths.entry: Let lesser subjects die so no blow lands on you — take no face damage, spend creatures freely.

nodes.name: Expendable
nodes.signal: won a match in which you lost 3+ of your own creatures but took no damage to the face
nodes.ability: when a creature you control dies, gain 1 life

nodes.name: The crown's due
nodes.signal: won a match having lost more creatures than your opponent
nodes.ability: when one of your creatures dies, your next card costs 1 less

nodes.name: Bloodline
nodes.signal: lost 20+ creatures across a run and finished it at full life
nodes.ability: whenever a creature you control dies, draw a card

paths.name: The Martyr-King
paths.entry: Take the blows on your own life and let your people stand — take the face damage, don't throw creatures away to block.

nodes.name: Endure
nodes.signal: won a match in which you took 10+ damage to the face but lost no creatures
nodes.ability: at the start of your turn, gain 1 life

nodes.name: The long reign
nodes.signal: won a match after dropping below 5 life at some point
nodes.ability: your creatures cost 1 less while you are below half life

nodes.name: Dawn eternal
nodes.signal: gained 15+ life in a single match you won
nodes.ability: once per turn, prevent the first damage dealt to your face

paths.name: Decrees of Order
paths.entry: Spend Light to enact a Law of the realm — you CHOOSE which, at a cutscene. Come back to enact more; they stack.

nodes.name: The first decree
nodes.signal: won a match while Aurelle was on the field
nodes.ability: unlocks LAWS: spend Light to enact one of the Laws below (chosen at a cutscene). You may enact more over the run.

nodes.name: Law: Singular Assault
nodes.signal: won a match in which the enemy attacked you with 4+ creatures
nodes.ability: LAW — while Aurelle is on the field, only one enemy creature may attack each turn

nodes.name: Law: Toll of War
nodes.signal: won a match in which you were attacked 5+ times
nodes.ability: LAW — each enemy creature must spend 1 Light to attack you

nodes.name: Law: Measured Muster
nodes.signal: won a match in which the enemy played 4+ creatures
nodes.ability: LAW — the enemy may play only one creature per turn
